settings.title: Precision Sleep
settings.text: Tracks Deep, REM, and Light sleep stages to optimize your recovery.

settings.title: Continuous HRV
settings.text: Measures the time between your heartbeats to calculate physical stress and readiness.

settings.title: Activity Monitoring
settings.text: Automatically detects movement, steps, and dynamic calorie burn throughout the day.

settings.title: Wear 24/7
settings.text: Slip it on and forget it's there. The aerospace-grade titanium design is lighter than a conventional ring.

settings.title: Track Invisibly
settings.text: Precision infrared and NTC sensors map your heart rate, HRV, blood oxygen, and sleep stages continuously.

settings.title: Discover Insights
settings.text: Open the companion app to reveal personalized readiness, activity, and recovery metrics built on clinical-grade data.

settings.heading: Weightless
settings.description: Lighter than a conventional wedding band.

settings.label: Materials
settings.value: Aerospace-grade titanium inner molding, scratch-resistant PVD coating.

settings.label: Battery Life
settings.value: Up to 7 days on a single charge. Fully recharges in 80 minutes.

settings.label: Sensors
settings.value: Infrared Photoplethysmography (PPG), NTC Temperature tags, 3D Accelerometer.

settings.label: Water Resistance
settings.value: 100m (10 ATM). Safe for showering, swimming, and diving.

settings.label: Connectivity
settings.value: Bluetooth Low Energy®. Syncs seamlessly with iOS and Android.

settings.quote: I've tried every wearable on the market. This is the only one I never take off. The sleep insights are life-changing.
settings.author: Marcus T.

settings.quote: The readiness score dictates my entire training schedule. It’s incredibly accurate and doesn’t look like a piece of plastic tech.
settings.author: Sarah L.

settings.quote: Finally, a health tracker that actually looks like high-end jewelry. The 7-day battery life means I actually use it.
settings.author: David C.

settings.question: What does AURARING track?
settings.answer: AURARING tracks heart rate, HRV, blood oxygen, skin temperature, sleep stages, activity, and readiness.

settings.question: How long does the battery last?
settings.answer: Up to 7 days on a single charge.

settings.question: Is it waterproof?
settings.answer: Yes. AURARING is water-resistant up to 100 meters (10 ATM).
